summary: Tested Excel Import/Export feature for Admin Data Management page. All 29 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all 6 data source cards (Customers, Dealers, Orders, Warranties, Master SKUs, Inventory) showing Export/Template buttons. Import section with Data Source dropdown, Import Mode dropdown, and file upload working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Excel import/export implementation is well-structured with proper validation
All 6 data sources properly configured with required fields and unique field for deduplication
Import supports both 'merge' (add/update) and 'replace' (clear all) modes
Template includes sample row and Instructions sheet for user guidance
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Test data created during import tests (TEST-SKU-* and test.import.*@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel Import/Export feature fully tested and working. Data sources: customers (268 records), dealers (57), orders (24), warranties (1211), master_skus (25), inventory (14). Backend uses pandas + openpyxl for Excel processing.

features_tested.GET /api/admin/excel/sources: PASS - Returns 6 data sources with record counts, fields, required_fields
features_tested.GET /api/admin/excel/export/customers: PASS - Downloads Excel file with customer data
features_tested.GET /api/admin/excel/export/dealers: PASS - Downloads Excel file with dealer data
features_tested.GET /api/admin/excel/export/orders: PASS - Downloads Excel file with order data
features_tested.GET /api/admin/excel/export/warranties: PASS - Downloads Excel file with warranty data
features_tested.GET /api/admin/excel/export/master_skus: PASS - Downloads Excel file with master SKU data
features_tested.GET /api/admin/excel/export/inventory: PASS - Downloads Excel file with inventory data
features_tested.GET /api/admin/excel/template/master_sku: PASS - Downloads template with sample row and Instructions sheet
features_tested.POST /api/admin/excel/import/master_skus: PASS - Imports new records, updates existing
features_tested.Import validation: PASS - Returns 400 for missing required fields
features_tested.Auth protection: PASS - All endpoints require admin authentication
features_tested.Frontend - Import section: PASS - Data Source dropdown, Import Mode dropdown, file input
features_tested.Frontend - Full Database Backup tab: PASS - Export and Restore buttons present
